chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Cr. Misc. No.636 of 2024 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For order on MA. 7801/2024. 2. For order on office objections 3. For order on MA 7802/2024. 4. For hearing of main case. 10.06.2024. Mr. Imtiaz Ali shah, advocate for applicant. = 1. Granted. 2 to 4. This application has been filed against order dated 29.05.2024 on an application u/s 22-A 7 B Cr.P.C. filed by the applicant for registration of FIR against abduction of his wife by proposed accused. I have heard learned counsel for applicant and perused the impugned order. No case for interference is made out, in presence of an alternate remedy of direct complaint. The reasons for dismissal of application of the applicant by learned justice of peace are based on proper appreciation of facts. In view of above, this application is dismissed. Applicant, however, would at liberty to file direct complaint against proposed accused, if so desires. The Cr. Misc. application is disposed of in the above terms. J U D G E A.K
